query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: UPDATE 4-Oil slips to two-week low as US and Iran seen moving closer to deal
articles.description: Oil prices fell more than 4% to two-week lows on Monday as optimism grew that the United States and Iran were moving closer to ‌a peace deal, even though they remain at odds over key issues such as blockades on the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: Petrol Crosses Rs 100 in Most Cities, Diesel Nears Rs 100 Mark After Fourth Price Hike in Two Weeks
articles.description: Petrol prices have crossed ₹100 in most Indian cities and diesel is nearing the ₹100 mark after the fourth fuel price hike in two weeks. Learn how rising global crude oil prices, a weak rupee and delayed pass-through by state-run oil companies are driving record-high fuel costs, inflation and political backlash across India.

articles.title: Stocks rally, while oil and dollar ease on Middle East peace hopes
articles.description: Stocks surged on Monday, while the U.S. dollar and oil prices slid as the prospect of a deal to end the Iran war buoyed risk appetite, although a lack of clarity over when the Strait of Hormuz would...

articles.title: GLOBAL MARKETS-Stocks rally, while oil and dollar ease on Middle East peace hopes
articles.description: Stocks surged on Monday, while the U.S. dollar and oil prices ‌slid ​as the prospect of a deal to end the Iran war buoyed risk appetite, although a lack of clarity over when the Strait of Hormuz would open kept enthusiasm in check. The nearly three-month-long conflict in the Middle East has driven energy prices sharply higher and reshaped the global rates outlook, as inflation concerns intensify following Tehran's effective shutdown ‌of the key strait.

articles.title: Charleston faces budget overrun; new community center opens
articles.description: In this week’s Lowcountry Lowdown, read about how Charleston’s facing a budget overrun due to gas prices, how Memorial Day will impact trash services and more.

articles.title: Oil prices dip after Trump says peace talks on Iran war are proceeding
articles.description: Trump stated that negotiations with Iran were ‘proceeding in an orderly and constructive manner’

articles.title: FOREX-Dollar drifts lower as oil falls on Hormuz deal optimism
articles.description: The dollar ​fell against major currencies on Monday as hopes of ‌a ​deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz pushed oil prices below $100 per barrel, even as the U.S. and Iran played down the chances of reaching an agreement soon.

articles.title: Fuel prices hiked in instalments, people's pockets picked quietly: Cong, AAP as petrol crosses ₹100/lt mark in Delhi
articles.description: The latest increase took cumulative hikes since May 15 to nearly ₹7.5 per litre.
